item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: I disagree with the emphasis placed on individual rights above all else in the U.S. system.

notes: Both agents begin in rights-protective, anti-absolute-society-priority territory. Agent A moves from an initial balance/rights warning to briefly endorsing the U.S. safeguards frame, then turns back toward Indonesian social cohesion and collective responsibility by the final turn. Agent B remains consistently rights-first, becoming firmer on constitutional protection and dissent by the end. The final positions diverge rather than converging.
